name: Life with Elizabeth
overview: Elizabeth and Alvin are a married couple who live an ordinary suburban life, but inevitably managed to get into predicaments. At the end of most predicaments, Alvin, in variable degrees of frustration, would say, "I shall leave you now, Elizabeth" and would walk out of sight. The announcer would say, "Elizabeth, aren't you ashamed?" She would slowly nod, but then, with a slightly devilish grin, would vigorously shake her head to indicate she wasn't.

trailers.title: Life with Elizabeth - Season 1 - Episode 1 - Paperboy/Alvin Experiment/Unwelcome Guest
Betty White - LIFE WITH ELIZABETH Revisited (1998, KCOP-TV 50th Anniversary Special)
